action.reasoning: Observation: MetricGAN+ baseline PESQ=3.134, ComplexMappingCRN PESQ=2.506. Custom models trained from scratch can't beat MetricGAN+. Analysis: MetricGAN+ was pre-trained on VoiceBank+DEMAND and is PESQ-optimized. CRN has better cbak (3.31 vs 2.90) and stoi (0.94 vs 0.93), suggesting it handles noise better but speech quality worse. An ensemble combining both models' strengths might improve PESQ. Decision: Test ensemble of MetricGAN+ and CRN on val data with different weights, then also try post-processing approaches. Pick the best and submit eval.
